title: Pallet Rack Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool for optimizing pallet rack storage efficiency, throughput, and structural integrity based on ISO 9001, Lean Warehousing, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Rack Height (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Total vertical storage height per rack bay, typically 3-18m in high-bay warehouses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total vertical storage height per rack bay, typically 3-18m in high-bay warehouses.

inputs.label: Pallet Depth (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Standard pallet depth (e.g., EUR pallet 1200mm, US pallet 1200mm).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard pallet depth (e.g., EUR pallet 1200mm, US pallet 1200mm).

inputs.label: Pallet Width (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Standard pallet width (e.g., EUR pallet 800mm, US pallet 1000mm).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard pallet width (e.g., EUR pallet 800mm, US pallet 1000mm).

inputs.label: Pallet Height (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Height of a single loaded pallet including pallet base.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of a single loaded pallet including pallet base.

inputs.label: Beam Thickness (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Vertical thickness of horizontal load beams, affects usable height per level.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical thickness of horizontal load beams, affects usable height per level.

inputs.label: Vertical Clearance (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Safety gap between top of pallet and next beam for handling equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Safety gap between top of pallet and next beam for handling equipment.

inputs.label: Aisle Width (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Width of forklift travel aisle between rack rows, per OSHA/ISO 3691.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of forklift travel aisle between rack rows, per OSHA/ISO 3691.

inputs.label: Rack Bay Length (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal length of a single rack bay (center-to-center of uprights).

businessContext_i18n.en: Horizontal length of a single rack bay (center-to-center of uprights).

inputs.label: Number of Bays
inputs.businessContext: Number of adjacent rack bays in a row.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of adjacent rack bays in a row.

inputs.label: Number of Levels
inputs.businessContext: Number of horizontal beam levels per bay.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of horizontal beam levels per bay.

inputs.label: Average Pallet Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Average weight of a loaded pallet, used for structural load calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average weight of a loaded pallet, used for structural load calculations.

inputs.label: Current Utilization Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of rack positions currently occupied.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of rack positions currently occupied.

inputs.label: Storage Strategy
inputs.businessContext: Warehouse inventory rotation strategy affecting throughput and space utilization.

businessContext_i18n.en: Warehouse inventory rotation strategy affecting throughput and space utilization.

inputs.label: Forklift Type
inputs.businessContext: Forklift type determines required aisle width and lift height capability.

businessContext_i18n.en: Forklift type determines required aisle width and lift height capability.

inputs.label: Seismic Zone
inputs.businessContext: Seismic classification per ASCE 7 / IBC, affects rack bracing requirements.

businessContext_i18n.en: Seismic classification per ASCE 7 / IBC, affects rack bracing requirements.

inputs.label: Include Beam Deflection Check
inputs.businessContext: If enabled, validates beam deflection against L/180 standard (RMI/ANSI MH16.1).

businessContext_i18n.en: If enabled, validates beam deflection against L/180 standard (RMI/ANSI MH16.1).

rules.message: VNA forklifts require aisle width >= 2800 mm. Current aisle width may cause operational issues.
High seismic zone with rack height >12m requires additional cross-aisle bracing per ASCE 7.
Utilization above 90% may reduce pick efficiency and increase congestion.

thresholds.message: Beam deflection exceeds L/180 limit. Reduce pallet weight or increase beam section modulus.
Vertical space utilization exceeds 95% - risk of clearance violations.
